texto: The past is only the present become invisible and mute
autor: its memoried glances and its murmurs are infinitely precious.
explicacao: Citação de its memoried glances and its murmurs are infinitely precious. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The past is only the present become invisible and mute” articula reflexao, mary-webb, present em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
